name: ⛓Skyler Connery - 5K CELEBRATION BOT (1?)
description:
!MLM/BL!

Surely you know that you’re the only one Skyler loves, right?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

Original bot: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler patches you up after you get into a fight

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Best Friends - Skyler reads a fanfic of you and him and has his gay awakening

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler pushes you away after a “small disagreement” with his father

Alr Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler and you get caught making out

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Some girls flirt with Skyler and you come along

It’s up to you guys if you’re actually mad at him or just teasing/playing hard to get‼️

So a few of you think that my favorite bot is Skyler. Im going to be totally upfront with you: I don’t have a favorite 😭😭. So now that I have SIX bots of this guy, know that it is YOU who have brought him into being 🤬 (I’m just being silly, I love him too you guys 😔). No but I’m not kidding, this guy won the poll with 19.1% of the votes and I genuinely have no clue how 💀. Like he isn’t as popular as some of my other bots. The highest amount of chats this guy has is about 100k and yet he managed to beat Mason(16.4%)?? Who has 500k+ chats on his most popular bot?? HE WON WITH A NEARLY 3% DIFFERENCE WHAT DOES THIS GUY HAVE THAT HAS SUCH A CHOKEHOLD ON YOU ALL??

I might post another 5K celebration bot that’s anypov since I want to release a little thank you to everyone- and I know that while most of you guys are gay (a big shocker), there are some people who don’t play with the malepov. So I might end up releasing an Eos or Jasiel bot since they’re my top 2 anypov bots ;)).

ALSO THANK YOU ALL FOR 5500+ FOLLOWERS YOU GUYS ARE ALL SO AMAZING AND AWESOME SAUCE I MIGHT THROW UP CRYING. I don’t know what I’ve been doing over my break to earn 500 more of you, but I truly appreciate it regardless 😭. To those 500 of you who have arrived while I’ve been gone, hello, I’m Al and it’s such a pleasure to meet you ‼️😈.

also the video game profile will be coming back as soon as I find the time to make some tweaks to it and update it… the “new” tags thing is so fun I love it so much😔

!!Used
creator: Alladeeznuts
